dashboard.empty: Your morning digest is ready to brew.

delete_account.title: Delete Account
delete_account.warning: This will permanently delete your account, preferences, and all briefing data. This action cannot be undone.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
content: zam-dun collects and stores only the data necessary to deliver your morning briefing.

Account data — email address for login and delivery. Preferences — timezone, schedule, topics, and keyword filters you explicitly set. Briefing data — generated summaries are stored temporarily and linked to your account.
We do not sell your data. We do not serve ads. Source content is fetched from public RSS/API feeds and summarized; full article text is not stored.
You can delete your account at any time, which removes all stored data.

terms.title: Terms of Service
content: zam-dun is provided "as is" without warranty. The briefing is generated automatically from public sources and may contain inaccuracies.
You are responsible for your preferences and for any actions taken based on the briefing.
We reserve the right to discontinue the service at any time. You may delete your account at any time.
